title: Budget Gap Pattern
insight: Bottom-up estimate ($1.55M) exceeds client budget ($850K) by 45%. This gap was detectable from the brief but not flagged by the client.

title: No Contingency Allocated
insight: Client budget includes zero contingency reserve. Industry standard for migration projects is 15-25%.

title: No Project Manager Assigned
insight: Project has no assigned PM. All coordination currently handled ad-hoc by department heads with competing priorities.

title: Decision Debt Accumulation
insight: 4 critical decisions remain unmade after full analysis cycle. Each decision blocks downstream execution. Pattern: decisions deferred to avoid conflict.

title: Unsigned Project Charter
insight: Project charter drafted but unsigned. No formal authority to proceed. Team operating on verbal approvals only.

title: Zero Risks Closed
insight: 22 risks identified across agents but zero have been closed or mitigated. Risk register is growing without active management.

title: Scope Not Confirmed
insight: Full migration vs phased approach not decided. Two parallel schedules maintained: compressed (25 weeks) vs phased (55 weeks). 2.2x variance.

title: Legacy System Dependencies
insight: HR system tightly coupled with 3 downstream systems. Migration requires coordinated cutover or parallel running period not in current plan.

title: Stakeholder Misalignment
insight: CFO focused on cost containment, CTO focused on technical completeness, HR Director focused on minimal disruption. No aligned success criteria.

title: Go-Live Confidence at 25%
insight: Composite readiness score of 25% based on 8/10 gate criteria failing. Primary driver: governance gaps, not technical issues.
